source.sourcePath: raw/sources/DHF (인허가)/01_HAD1717MC, MG/03_설계개발 출력/02_CCL 및 승인원/승인원/기구/환경자료/동인산업/H&Abyz MSDS& 시험성적서/MSDS HM (Ver.19-1).pdf

document.title: 물질안전보건자료 (Material Safety Date Sheet) - NANOCELL HM

sourceSummary.oneLine: MSDS for NANOCELL HM, a high-density polyurethane foam sheet used for shock and vibration absorption.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Provides safety information for customers using the company's product.
keyPoints: Product is identified as NANOCELL HM and chemical material as polyurethane.
The product use is a high-density polyurethane foam sheet with shock and vibration absorption properties.
General handling is stated to show no particular hazard or harmfulness.
Composition lists polyurethane, calcium carbonate, carbon black, and PET base film.
Legal regulation sections state no regulation under listed Korean and foreign regulatory categories.

entities.name: 유해화학물질관리법
entities.evidence: 유해화학물질관리법 등 타 부처의 화학물질관리관련법에 의한 규제 - : 규정 없음

concepts.name: High-density polyurethane foam sheet
concepts.evidence: 제품의 용도 충격 및 진동흡수성을 지닌 고밀도 폴리우레탄 폼 시트

concepts.name: Personal protective equipment
concepts.evidence: 작업장의 모든 작업자들은 보호 안경을 착용할 것을 권함

evidence.claim: The document is an MSDS issued by S&K POLYTEC CO.,LTD.
The product covered by the MSDS is NANOCELL HM.
The document version is Ver. 19-01.
The revision date is 2019-01-04 and the revision is Rev. 17.
The chemical material name is polyurethane.
The stated use is a high-density polyurethane foam sheet with shock and vibration absorption.
evidence.evidenceText: 제품의 용도 충격 및 진동흡수성을 지닌 고밀도 폴리우레탄 폼 시트

evidence.claim: The hazard classification is H0 F1 R0.
The MSDS states that general handling normally shows no hazard or harmfulness.
evidence.evidenceText: 일반적으로 취급 할 시 어떠한 위험이나 유해성이 나타나지 않음

evidence.claim: Dust may be generated during cutting or finishing work on the polyurethane foam sheet.
evidence.evidenceText: 절단이나 다른 마무리 작업 시 폴리우레탄 폼 시트에 먼지가 발생할 수 있음.

evidence.claim: Composition includes polyurethane as a trade secret up to max 69%.
Composition includes calcium carbonate CAS 471-34-1 up to max 30%.
Composition includes carbon black CAS 1333-86-4 up to max 0.55%.
Composition includes PET base film CAS 25038-59-9 up to max 40%.
The product appearance is a solid, conductive high-density polyurethane foam sheet.
evidence.evidenceText: 외관: 고체, 도전성 고밀도 폴리우레탄 폼 시트

evidence.claim: The product is insoluble in water.
The specific gravity is 0.3 - 0.7.
The product is chemically stable.
The MSDS states no regulation under the Industrial Safety and Health Act.
evidence.pageTarget: Korea Industrial Safety and Health Act chemical regulation

evidence.claim: The MSDS states no regulation under hazardous chemical substance management-related laws listed in the document.
evidence.evidenceText: 유해화학물질관리법 등 타 부처의 화학물질관리관련법에 의한 규제 - : 규정 없음

evidence.claim: The MSDS states no regulation under other foreign laws.
evidence.evidenceText: 기타 외국법에 의한 규제: 규정 없음

evidence.claim: The document states its purpose is to provide customer safety information and does not guarantee accuracy or safety of the information.
evidence.evidenceText: 본 자료는 당사 제품을 사용하는 고객들의 안전에 대한 정보 제공을 목적으로 하고 있으며, 앞서 표현된 정보의 정확성과 안전성을 보증하지는 않습니다.

reviewFlags.reason: No issuing regulatory authority is identified; authority is inferred only from company address and Korean law references.
No standards are cited in the source text.
Preprocessed text contains OCR or extraction artifacts such as 'Material Safety Date Sheet' and irregular Korean spacing.
